title: Five Lives
description: Plugin I made for frglcnoly. i think it's just a lifesteal ripoff, i never watched it but just did what he asked lmao
body:
**Because this was a commission I am no longer actively working on it, however you can still message me if you need a small change/update. If you're interested in having a custom mod or plugin made, hit me up on discord**

Spigot Plugin made for FrglCnoly's 5 life SMP! It is designed for 1.20.1 but might work on other versions. If there's a bug just leave a comment or message me on discord (iamnotacar). Thanks!

### Info

You start out with 5 lives. 

Your health is tied to your lives.

If you die (it drops one), use /withdraw, or craft one, you can gain a heart to increase your lives.

If you kill someone, you also gain their life. 

The lives are capped at 10. 

If you reach 0, you get banned from the server, and someone has to craft a revive card with 3 lives and use /revive to bring you back.
